hero.title: Secure & Ephemeral PDF Processing
hero.subtitle: PDF Serverless is the enterprise solution for handling documents without compromising privacy. We process your files and permanently delete them immediately after.

security.title: Security and Governance
security.subtitle: Designed for companies that cannot risk their data on third-party servers.

storage.title: Zero Storage
storage.desc: Your original and resulting files are automatically deleted from the system in up to 24 hours. No data is kept permanently.

encryption.title: Total Encryption
encryption.desc: We use SSL/TLS for transfer and temporary presigned URLs. Only you have access to the generated download link.

governance.title: Data Governance
governance.desc: Full transparency and auditable processing. Detailed logs of who processed what, but without file content in the database.

step1.title: Direct Upload
step1.desc: The file goes directly to a secure Bucket via Presigned URL, without passing through intermediate servers.

step2.title: Serverless Processing
step2.desc: Dedicated Lambdas process your PDF in an isolated environment. Scalable and isolated.

step3.title: Self-destruction
step3.desc: After download or timeout expiration, all digital traces are eliminated.

comparison.title: Choose how you want to run
comparison.subtitle: Whether in our optimized cloud or on your own infrastructure, security is guaranteed.

item1.title: Lower Maintenance Cost
item1.desc: Zero spending on servers, databases, or infrastructure team.

item2.title: Always Updated
item2.desc: Instant access to the latest features and performance improvements.

item3.title: Effortless Security
item3.desc: Security patches and compliance applied automatically by us.

item1.title: Your Own Governance
item1.desc: Keep data within your network perimeter and VPC.

item2.title: Custom Configurations
item2.desc: Adjust processing and retention limits as needed.

item3.title: Full Auditing
item3.desc: Full access to infrastructure logs and Lambda execution.

api_first.title: API First: Built for Developers
api_first.subtitle: Our architecture was designed from day one to be consumed by other systems. Whether on our Cloud platform or your own infrastructure, integrations are simple and powerful.

item1.title: Pure REST Endpoints
item1.desc: Simple contracts for upload, processing, and download.

item2.title: JWT Authentication
item2.desc: Industry-standard security for your API keys.

item3.title: API Consistency
item3.desc: The same API the frontend uses is available for your backend.

open_source.title: Your AWS, Your Data, Your Rules
open_source.subtitle: Maximum privacy means total control. You can deploy PDF Serverless directly to your AWS account in minutes using AWS SAM.

item1.title: Self-Hosted
item1.desc: Keep all infrastructure under your governance and reduce costs.

item2.title: Open Source
item2.desc: Transparent and auditable code available to the community.

login_page.title: Welcome back
login_page.subtitle: Sign in to manage your PDF files
login_page.error_incomplete: The API did not return all necessary data (token/user).
login_page.error_default: Error signing in. Check your credentials.

dashboard_page.title: My Processes
dashboard_page.subtitle: Track the status of your files
dashboard_page.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the files?
dashboard_page.error_fetch: Error loading your processes. Try again.

new_job_page.title: New Process
new_job_page.subtitle: Choose the tool and upload your files
new_job_page.error_default: Error processing files. Check if the backend is running.
